title: Microsoft's EU Monopoly: Why Claude ISN'T on Teams! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof questions why Anthropic's Claude is not integrated into Microsoft Teams, suggesting Microsoft's strong EU market position and its own Copilot AI offering may be reasons for the lack of integration.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof asks why Anthropic's Claude is not integrated into Microsoft Teams. The video attributes the absence to Microsoft's strong EU market position and its own Copilot AI offering, framing the gap as a matter of competitive positioning rather than technical limitation. The takeaway: a dominant platform vendor with a first-party assistant has little incentive to surface a rival model inside its enterprise collaboration product.
